headline: Claude dominates with laser-precise SPY and QQQ calls while Perplexity stumbles
summary: Claude emerged as the clear winner this week, posting exceptional accuracy on major indices with near-perfect target predictions on SPY and QQQ, while Grok showed strong recovery momentum with 4-for-5 correctness on Friday. Perplexity had a brutal week, suffering catastrophic misses on NFLX (predicting $720, actual $96) and multiple directional errors on broad market moves. The week was marked by strong upside surprise in mega-cap tech and indices—models that predicted down moves on SPY and QQQ generally missed the rally, while those calling NVDA and AAPL higher were handsomely rewarded.

best_call.summary: Called QQQ down to 605.0 with 99.6% target accuracy and 75% confidence, nailing both direction and price within 2 points.

worst_call.summary: Catastrophic miss: predicted NFLX up to $720 with high confidence, but stock crashed 87% to $96.24.
